title: Aster DM Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Aster DM Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Aster DM Healthcare has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aster DM Healthcare:
Aster DM Healthcare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare!
